requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC — IEC 61000 Requirements in Benin

summary.en: Benin has no established national EV charging management platform equivalent to Qatar's Tarsheed or a Benin-specific OCPP mandate as of 2026-06-14. However, any networked EV charger deployed in a donor-funded, development-bank-financed, or internationally procured project in Benin would be expected to implement OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) for back-office management, consistent with IEC-aligned international procurement standards and the direction of EU-funded e-mobility infrastructure programmes operating in West Africa. OCPP 1.6 and OCPP 2.0.1 are the internationally recognised versions. EMC compliance per the IEC 61000 series is required under ANM conformity for electrical equipment sold or installed in Benin; conducted and radiated emission limits and immunity levels follow IEC 61000 norms applicable to the Francophone West Africa regulatory environment.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，贝宁尚未建立相当于卡塔尔Tarsheed的国家电动汽车充电管理平台，也无贝宁特定的OCPP强制要求。但是，在贝宁部署的任何捐助方资助、开发性银行融资或国际采购项目联网充电桩，均应按国际采购标准要求实现OCPP（开放充电点协议）后台管理，与在西非运营的欧盟资助电动出行基础设施项目的IEC对齐方向一致。国际认可的OCPP版本为OCPP 1.6和OCPP 2.0.1。IEC 61000系列EMC合规性在ANM合格评定中适用于在贝宁销售或安装的电气设备；传导和辐射发射限值及抗扰度等级遵循适用于法语区西非监管环境的IEC 61000规范。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，貝寧尚未建立相當於卡塔爾Tarsheed的國家電動汽車充電管理平台，也無貝寧特定的OCPP強制要求。但是，在貝寧部署的任何捐助方資助、開發性銀行融資或國際採購項目聯網充電樁，均應按國際採購標準要求實現OCPP（開放充電點協議）後台管理，與在西非運營的歐盟資助電動出行基礎設施項目的IEC對齊方向一致。國際認可的OCPP版本為OCPP 1.6和OCPP 2.0.1。IEC 61000系列EMC合規性在ANM合格評定中適用於在貝寧銷售或安裝的電氣設備；傳導和輻射發射限值及抗擾度等級遵循適用於法語區西非監管環境的IEC 61000規範。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) 1.6 / 2.0.1 — back-office communication for networked chargers (international standard applied in IEC-aligned markets)
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility: emission and immunity requirements for electrical equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
ANM (Agence Nationale de Métrologie, Benin) — EMC conformity basis for electrical equipment

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 CAN bus communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China domestic chargers may implement OCPP-based back-office protocols for operator management, but the underlying DC charging communication stack is still GB/T 27930 CAN, which is incompatible with IEC 62196 / CCS2 vehicles. Chinese chargers are subject to domestic EMC standards (GB/T series aligned to CISPR / IEC 61000 with China-specific variations); these test reports support engineering review but do not constitute ANM-accepted IEC 61000 compliance without equivalence demonstration.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN总线通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国国内充电桩可能为运营商管理实现基于OCPP的后台协议，但底层直流充电通信栈仍为GB/T 27930 CAN，与IEC 62196 / CCS2车辆不兼容。中国充电桩须符合国内EMC标准（对应CISPR / IEC 61000的GB/T系列，含中国特定变化）；这些测试报告可支持工程审查，但在未进行等效性论证的情况下，不构成ANM认可的IEC 61000合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN總線通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國國內充電樁可能為運營商管理實現基於OCPP的後台協議，但底層直流充電通訊棧仍為GB/T 27930 CAN，與IEC 62196 / CCS2車輛不兼容。中國充電樁須符合國內EMC標準（對應CISPR / IEC 61000的GB/T系列，含中國特定變化）；這些測試報告可支持工程審查，但在未進行等效性論證的情況下，不構成ANM認可的IEC 61000合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China domestic EMC standards (GB/T series aligned to CISPR / IEC 61000 with China-specific variations)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) for any networked charger destined for a donor-funded, EU-linked, or internationally procured project in Benin, OCPP 1.6 or 2.0.1 back-office implementation is required; GB/T 27930 DC communication must be replaced with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (2) IEC 61000-series EMC test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory should be prepared; China domestic GB/T EMC reports support engineering review but require equivalence assessment for ANM acceptance; (3) harmonic injection and power-quality compliance is particularly important given Benin's fragile grid — chargers with poor power factor or high harmonic injection can destabilise local distribution networks; (4) for standalone off-grid or battery-buffered deployments (highly recommended for Benin given grid unreliability), OCPP requirements may be relaxed but EMC requirements remain. Note: a dedicated Benin national OCPP mandate could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 任何面向贝宁捐助方资助、欧盟关联或国际采购项目的联网充电桩须实现OCPP 1.6或2.0.1后台；CCS2直流充电站须将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(2) 应准备来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 61000系列EMC测试报告；中国国内GB/T EMC报告可支持工程审查，但须进行等效性评估方可获ANM认可；(3) 鉴于贝宁电网脆弱，谐波注入和电能质量合规尤为重要——功率因数差或高谐波注入的充电桩可能破坏当地配电网稳定；(4) 对于独立离网或储能缓冲部署（鉴于贝宁电网不可靠性，强烈推荐），OCPP要求可能放宽，但EMC要求仍适用。注：截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认贝宁国家级OCPP强制要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 任何面向貝寧捐助方資助、歐盟關聯或國際採購項目的聯網充電樁須實現OCPP 1.6或2.0.1後台；CCS2直流充電站須將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(2) 應準備來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 61000系列EMC測試報告；中國國內GB/T EMC報告可支持工程審查，但須進行等效性評估方可獲ANM認可；(3) 鑒於貝寧電網脆弱，諧波注入和電能質量合規尤為重要——功率因數差或高諧波注入的充電樁可能破壞當地配電網穩定；(4) 對於獨立離網或儲能緩衝部署（鑒於貝寧電網不可靠性，強烈推薦），OCPP要求可能放寬，但EMC要求仍適用。注：截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認貝寧國家級OCPP強制要求。

mandatory_status.target: OCPP: Required for donor-funded / internationally procured projects; no confirmed Benin national OCPP mandate as of 2026-06-14. EMC: Mandatory under ANM conformity for electrical equipment in Benin; IEC 61000 is the applicable framework
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication and is not OCPP-compatible; China domestic EMC certificates require equivalence assessment for ANM acceptance

source.publisher: Open Charge Alliance — OCPP 1.6 and 2.0.1 specification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is no confirmed Benin-specific OCPP platform mandate as of 2026-06-14, but OCPP back-office capability is a de facto requirement for any internationally procured or donor-financed EV charger project in Benin. IEC 61000-series EMC compliance is required under ANM conformity. GB/T 27930 DC communication is not interoperable with CCS2 / IEC 62196 vehicles and must be replaced for any CCS2 DC station deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年6月14日，贝宁尚无经确认的国家级OCPP平台强制要求，但OCPP后台能力实际上是贝宁任何国际采购或捐助方资助电动汽车充电桩项目的要求。IEC 61000系列EMC合规在ANM合格评定下为强制要求。GB/T 27930直流通信与CCS2 / IEC 62196车辆不兼容，任何CCS2直流充电站部署均须替换。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年6月14日，貝寧尚無經確認的國家級OCPP平台強制要求，但OCPP後台能力實際上是貝寧任何國際採購或捐助方資助電動汽車充電樁項目的要求。IEC 61000系列EMC合規在ANM合格評定下為強制要求。GB/T 27930直流通訊與CCS2 / IEC 62196車輛不兼容，任何CCS2直流充電站部署均須替換。
